query: SELECT m.id, m.userId, m.name, m.monsterType, m.isActive, m.level, u.name as userName FROM monsters m JOIN users u ON m.userId = u.id ORDER BY m.userId LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4JQihNFt71oUk4Z.root --database DZLsNMXz8tKivpZtpPajU7 --execute SELECT m.id, m.userId, m.name, m.monsterType, m.isActive, m.level, u.name as userName FROM monsters m JOIN users u ON m.userId = u.id ORDER BY m.userId LIMIT 20;
